title: tl0 Task
description: A single unit of work in the tl0 task coordination system.

description.description: Detailed description sufficient for an agent to execute without ambiguity.

events.description: Append-only log of lifecycle events. First event is always 'created'. Status is derived from the last non-created event.

at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this event occurred.

by.description: Agent or human identifier responsible for this event.

blocked_by.description: Task IDs that must be done before this task is claimable.

model.description: Which AI model is needed for this task.

thinking.description: Whether extended thinking mode is needed.

design_references.description: Design documents relevant to this task.

produces.description: File paths this task creates or modifies.

context_files.description: File paths the agent should read before starting.

result.description: Summary of what happened when completed. Set when a done event is appended.

task_children.description: IDs of child tasks this task produced.

task_parent.description: ID of the task that spawned this one. Null if created directly by a human.

merge_sha.description: Git SHA of the squash-merge commit on main. Set after successful merge+push.
